title: Foreign-flow aggregate -> forward BIST-index TL-REAL return: first official measurement (N<=3, count=1)
decision_owner: maintainer. Harness MEASURES + RECOMMENDS; never auto-deploys. Even a TRADEABLE verdict is a CANDIDATE only (separate maintainer decision).
discipline_note: Committed BEFORE any D-211 result is computed and BEFORE any result is seen. The engine (src/screening/d211_foreign_flow.py) REFUSES to run unless this file exists. ALL thresholds/definitions/keep-bar below are FROZEN and will NOT be relaxed post-hoc (no predictor redefinition, no window widening, no lag re-pick, no cost re-calibration, no keep-bar loosening). Post-hoc relaxation = guard-RAISE. MEASUREMENT-ONLY; optimization FORBIDDEN. N=1 candidate (aggregate foreign-flow market-timing). This is a MEASUREMENT, NOT an optimization.
question_single: Does this-month aggregate foreign NET flow, in the form knowable with the ~6-week publication lag (i.e. lag-2), predict next-month BIST-index TL-REAL return? Single-asset time series. NOT stock selection.
honest_expectation: prior LOW. RR-038 foreign single-name forecast weak; foreign participation at multi-year lows; ~6wk lag is a handicap; timing has beaten us twice (DISC-2). Likely verdict TRADEABLE-DEGIL -- but this time on a PRICE-ORTHOGONAL axis, MEASURED. Surprise possibility: aggregate-timing content that single-name tests missed; if it appears it is reported plainly. Whatever the result, it is recorded (no celebration).

predictor_FROZEN.name: NF_pct
predictor_FROZEN.why_usd: USD columns chosen to reduce TL-inflation scale distortion (LOCKED, not mined).
predictor_FROZEN.aggregation: month m: NET_usd(m) = SUM over all tickers (buy_usd - sell_usd); GROSS_usd(m) = SUM over all tickers (buy_usd + sell_usd).
predictor_FROZEN.stationarization_PRIMARY_ONLY: NF_pct(m) = NET_usd(m) / GROSS_usd(m)  -> natural [-1,1], scale-free 'net tilt of foreign activity'.
predictor_FROZEN.alternative_definitions_status: z-score(NET_usd) and NET_usd/mcap are SECONDARY-REPORT ONLY. They CANNOT rescue a failed primary (cherry-pick FORBIDDEN). Alternative-definition mining is FORBIDDEN.
predictor_FROZEN.lookahead_lag_LOCK: To predict return-month t, predictor = NF_pct(t-2). Rationale: month (t-2) flow is published ~mid (t-1) (~6wk lag) so it is in the information set at end of (t-1) = the decision point entering month t. Look-ahead-safe.
predictor_FROZEN.contemporaneous_status: lag-0 reg(real_ret_t ~ NF_pct(t)) is reported for DIAGNOSIS ONLY, stamped NON-DEPLOYABLE; it does NOT count toward any keep-bar.
predictor_FROZEN.ticker_filter: rows where col0 matches ^[A-Z0-9]{2,6}\.E$ (segment sub-headers excluded). Parser geometry mirrors edge-arastirma/lab/ff_data.py (PORTED, read-only).

dependent_FROZEN.index_caveat: price-only, NO dividends (per snapshot meta: equity disadvantaged ~2-4%/yr). XU100 total-return is NOT available locally -> price-return used (directive-allowed fallback).
dependent_FROZEN.nominal_monthly_return: r_nom(t) = idx(month-end t) / idx(month-end t-1) - 1, using the last available trading-day value within each calendar month.
dependent_FROZEN.real_return_LOCK: real_ret(t) = r_nom(t) - infl(t)  (directive-literal subtraction; deflation MANDATORY).
dependent_FROZEN.forward_definition: forward_real_ret_t is the TL-real return EARNED over calendar month t (end of t-1 -> end of t).

window_FROZEN.deviation_from_directive: Directive named PRIMARY 2010-01..2026-04 'snapshot temiz, YENI-PULL YOK'. DATA-FACT (RR-Y1-002 STAGE-0 / D-210): the only clean LOCAL XU100 series (exposure_d187_xu100, XU100.IS price-only) covers 2019-01..2026-04 ONLY; prices_official BIST100-index column is entirely NULL; clean_universe adj-prices+adj-factors also start 2019, so a corporate-action-clean index pre-2019 is NOT locally constructible. maintainer (maintainer) APPROVED Option-1 on 2026-06-04: set PRIMARY = 2019-01..2026-04 (no new pull), freeze the rest as directed.
window_FROZEN.effective_forward_months: first computable forward_real_ret = 2019-02 (needs idx Jan-end & Feb-end); through 2026-04 -> ~87 monthly observations. Predictor NF_pct(t-2) requires FF from 2018-12 (available).
window_FROZEN.OPTIONAL_extension_2006_2010: N/A -- no local XU100 pre-2019. Dropped (cannot run); not a primary-verdict input.
window_FROZEN.gap_2017_04: foreign_flow 2017-04 file is MISSING. It falls OUTSIDE the 2019+ window, so it does not affect this measurement. NO interpolation anywhere (locked principle); any future month with missing predictor or return is DROPPED, not filled.

regime_split_FROZEN.rationale: 2022-01-01 = calendar-year boundary where TR inflation regime accelerated (matches D-203 PRIMARY split convention). Replaces the directive's 2010-2017/2018-2026 split, which is moot under the 2019+ window.
regime_split_FROZEN.stability_test: slope sign must be the SAME in A and B.
regime_split_FROZEN.concentration_test_LOCK: leave-one-regime-out: removing EITHER sub-period must NOT flip the full-sample slope sign. If it flips -> effect concentrated in one regime -> FRAGILE -> keep-bar[2] FAILS (value-factor lesson).

measurement_plan_FROZEN.1_primary_regression: OLS reg(forward_real_ret_t ~ a + b*NF_pct(t-2)); report slope b sign+magnitude and Newey-West HAC t with lags=6 (directive lag>=6). Series is monthly NON-OVERLAPPING by construction (lag-2 predictor, 1-month forward). Stambaugh-awareness: ALSO report NF_pct AR(1) persistence and note the non-overlap.
measurement_plan_FROZEN.2_regime_stability: compute slope b in A and B; apply stability_test + concentration_test (above).
measurement_plan_FROZEN.3_deployable_leg: signal-conditional single-asset exposure: at end of (t-1), if NF_pct(t-2) > 0 -> hold XU100 long for month t (earn real_ret_t); if <= 0 -> hold TLREF cash for month t (earn real TLREF carry). Monthly cadence, low turnover. Compare NET cumulative TL-real vs buy-and-hold XU100 NET cumulative TL-real.
measurement_plan_FROZEN.cash_leg_source: TLREF cash real = tlref_nom(t) - infl(t); tlref_nom from data/snapshots/exposure_d187_tlref.parquet MoM (return-index). NOTE: TLREF real-data starts 2022-07; pre-2022-07 is D-187 proxy-extended -> reported but flagged.
measurement_plan_FROZEN.cost_model_FROZEN: index-level switch cost: one-way = D207_TIER_MEGA_HALF_SPREAD (5.28bp); Kyle impact = 0 (index = mega-liquid, deepest book); commission = D204_COMMISSION_PCT (0). Cost charged on each index ENTRY and each index EXIT (one-way each; full in-out round trip = 2x = 10.6bp). Buy-and-hold pays a single entry one-way cost. NO per-stock Roll/Kyle (this is a single-index instrument, not a basket).

keep_bar_FROZEN_all_required.2: slope sign regime-stable (same sign in A AND B) AND not concentrated (leave-one-regime-out does not flip full-sample sign)
keep_bar_FROZEN_all_required.3: deployable leg NET cumulative TL-real BEATS buy-and-hold XU100 NET cumulative TL-real (post-cost, lag-2)
keep_bar_FROZEN_all_required.4: look-ahead-safe (lag-2 applied; contemporaneous lag-0 leg is NON-DEPLOYABLE and does NOT count)
keep_bar_FROZEN_all_required.verdict_rule: ALL 4 PASS -> TRADEABLE (price-orthogonal aggregate-timing edge; CANDIDATE only). ANY fail -> TRADEABLE-DEGIL (recorded clean).
keep_bar_FROZEN_all_required.forbidden: hi52-conditioning, sub-group slicing, composite-weight optimization, alternative predictor-definition mining to rescue primary, post-hoc threshold relaxation.

thresholds_reference.new_block: src/signals/thresholds.py D211_* (ADDITIVE only; zero edit to existing D203/204/205/209/realistic_cost constants -- Strangler).

foreign_flow.note: read-only archive; NOT in CI (synthetic test only).

snapshots_content_hash_sha256_prefix.guard: engine asserts these hashes on load; mismatch RAISES (reproducibility).

strangler_constraints.zero_touch: committed motors (d203/204/205/209 + realistic_cost + thresholds existing blocks + ballast) NOT modified; only ADD d211 files + D211_* block.
strangler_constraints.ci: the foreign_flow archive does NOT enter CI; CI runs a SYNTHETIC unit test only; the real measurement is a local ARTIFACT (d211_results.json).
strangler_constraints.no_absolute_paths: archive path resolved via the main-repo data junction / relative path; no machine-specific absolute path committed.

outputs: docs/yol1/d211_results.json (after run: NF_pct series + primary reg b/t + regime A/B + deployable leg net-cum vs buy-hold + 4 keep-bar + verdict + secondary)
docs/research/D-211-rapor.md (verdict TRADEABLE / TRADEABLE-DEGIL; price-orthogonal axis; lag-2 honesty; OOS-gap explicit) + docs/RESEARCH_REGISTRY.md line
